metadata.description: Subsurface scattering - light penetrating translucent materials

summary: Light passes through and scatters inside translucent materials (skin, wax, marble). Complex raytracing required.
blender_implementation: Uses BSSRDF model (bidirectional subsurface scattering reflection distribution function)
unity_limitations: No native BSSRDF in standard ShaderGraph
Only works in specific render pipelines (HDRP)
approximation: Use Translucency with custom shaders or fake SSS
compatibility_loss_70_percent: Fundamental rendering technique difference - approximation only
